Name: SVP Collisions, Physics, and Hit Stops
Author: JosephsDeadish
Description: Plug-and-play physics mod for Stardew Valley 1.5.6 – 1.6+. Body jiggle (feminine & masculine), HDT hair physics, per-profile cycling idles (female/male/creature), clothing flow physics (flowy/tight fabrics, no clipping, wind/rain/water/speed), per-archetype monster idle physics (Slime pulse, Bat wing-twitch, Skeleton rattle, Dragon breathing, Elemental energy, etc.), farm animal idle physics (chicken peck, cow tail swish, rabbit ear twitch, etc.), run-step impulses, ragdoll knockback, hitstop flash, NPC sword knockdown, environmental physics, debris physics, warp-step impulse, eating bounce, lightning flinch, skill level-up bounce. Detects and integrates 12+ weather mods (More Rain, Climate of Ferngill, Wind Effects, Cloudy Skies, SVE, etc.). Works with Fashion Sense, LewdEW, Valley Girls, XTardew, HornyFur, Creatures & Cuties, Ridgeside Village, East Scarp, and all sprite/hair/creature mods.
